output.code:
# Let's load the file to see exact content and measure offsets
path = "/mnt/data/file-8kV1vzPjwrb9RDhb2LWYCq-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:5000]

import re, json, sys, textwrap, unicodedata, itertools, math
path = "/mnt/data/file-8kV1vzPjwrb9RDhb2LWYCq-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()

# find ayah spans inside {...}
aya_spans=[]
for m in re.finditer(r"\{([^{}]+)\}", text):
    content = m.group(1)
    start = m.start(1)
    end = m.end(1)
    # trim whitespace at edges
    while start < end and text[start].isspace():
        start += 1
    while end > start and text[end-1].isspace():
        end -= 1
    # also trim punctuation at edges? For ayah, usually none inside braces
    # But we can apply the allowed punctuation char set.
    punctuation_edges = set(list("'\"]«»()[]،؛:.,!?…"))
    # Use iteration to remove punctuation at edges
    while start < end and text[start] in punctuation_edges:
        start += 1
    while end > start and text[end-1] in punctuation_edges:
        end -= 1
    aya_spans.append((start, end, text[start:end]))
aya_spans

# Find hadith spans inside double quotes
quote_positions = [m.start() for m in re.finditer(r'"', text)]
len(quote_positions), quote_positions[:10]

punctuation_edges = set(list("'\"]«»()[]،؛:.,!?…"))
hadith_spans=[]

# process pairs
pairs = [(quote_positions[i], quote_positions[i+1]) for i in range(0,len(quote_positions)-1,2)]
pairs, len(pairs)

def trim_edges(text, start, end):
    # trim whitespace
    while start < end and text[start].isspace():
        start += 1
    while end > start and text[end-1].isspace():
        end -= 1
    # trim punctuation at edges
    punctuation_edges = set(list("'\"]«»()[]،؛:.,!?…"))
    while start < end and text[start] in punctuation_edges:
        start += 1
    while end > start and text[end-1] in punctuation_edges:
        end -= 1
    return start, end

hadith_spans=[]
for open_q, close_q in pairs:
    start = open_q + 1
    end = close_q
    start, end = trim_edges(text, start, end)
    hadith_spans.append((start, end, text[start:end]))
# Now handle unmatched last quote at 1805
last_quote_pos = quote_positions[-1]
if len(quote_positions) % 2 == 1:
    start = last_quote_pos + 1
    end = len(text)
    start, end = trim_edges(text, start, end)  # trim trailing whitespace, punctuation at edges if any
    hadith_spans.append((start, end, text[start:end]))
hadith_spans

# Build citations list and validate substring extraction
aya_cits = [{"span_start": s, "span_end": e, "span_text": t, "citation_type": "Aya"} for (s,e,t) in aya_spans]
hadith_cits = [{"span_start": s, "span_end": e, "span_text": t, "citation_type": "Hadeeth"} for (s,e,t) in hadith_spans]

all_cits = aya_cits + hadith_cits

# Validate
errs=[]
for c in all_cits:
    s,e,t=c["span_start"], c["span_end"], c["span_text"]
    if text[s:e]!=t:
        errs.append((c, text[s:e]))
len(errs), errs[:1]

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":222,"span_end":421,"span_text":"وَكَذَلِكَ أَوْحَيْنَا إِلَيْكَ رُوحًا مِنْ أَمْرِنَا مَا كُنتَ تَدْرِي مَا الْكِتَابُ وَلَا الْإِيمَانُ وَلَكِنْ جَعَلْنَاهُ تَفْمِيَةً عَلَى قَلْبِكَ وَمُصَدِّقًا لِذِكْرِنَا وَهُدًى لِلْمُتَّقِينَ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":454,"span_end":593,"span_text":"وَإِنْ يَمُدُّوكَ عَلَى الْقَتْلِ ثَمَّ قَدْ يَمُدُّ اللَّهُ عِنْدَهُ مِنْ قَبْلُ وَلَيُدْخِلَنَّ الَّذِينَ يَتَّقُونَ مِنْ عَذَابٍ غَلِيٍّ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":628,"span_end":685,"span_text":"وَإِنَّ هَذَا قَوْلُنَا لَمُبَيِّنٌ لِأُولِي الْأَلْبَابِ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":735,"span_end":881,"span_text":"إِنَّما الأَعْمَالُ بِالنِيَّةِ، وَإِنَّمَا لِلسَّائِلِ نِعْمَةٌ أَوْ عَذَابٌ يَكُونُ عَلَيْهِ أَوْ يُصَلِّي لَهُ أَوْ يُصَدِّقَهُ أَوْ يُزَكِّيهِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":931,"span_end":984,"span_text":"مَنْ أَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ وَأَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ فَهَلَكَ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1034,"span_end":1135,"span_text":"مَنْ أَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ وَأَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ فَذَلِكَ الَّذِي أَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ وَأَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1188,"span_end":1291,"span_text":"مَنْ أَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ وَأَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ فَكَذَلِكَ الَّذِي أَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ وَأَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1341,"span_end":1444,"span_text":"مَنْ أَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ وَأَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ فَكَذَلِكَ الَّذِي أَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ وَأَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1497,"span_end":1600,"span_text":"مَنْ أَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ وَأَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ فَكَذَلِكَ الَّذِي أَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ وَأَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1650,"span_end":1753,"span_text":"مَنْ أَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ وَأَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ فَكَذَلِكَ الَّذِي أَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ وَأَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1806,"span_end":1835,"span_text":"مَنْ أَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ وَأَ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"}]}
